I think we have a bugin src\common\dsstats.parser\DsstatsReplayMapper.Spawn.cs GetIncome function.
The base income for each player is 7.5
Each refinery, once built, generates 0.5
Once one team crossed the middle all players in the team get 1 extra mineral (and there is no no middle income anymore, it switches when the other team crosses the middle)
So the player with similar refineries but more middle control should have more money.
Can we try to write tests for it and verify it?
